yourCompanyUrl.title: Your company URL
yourCompanyUrl.description: Public homepage, product page, or pricing page for your SaaS company. Do not use private pages or customer data.

competitorUrls.title: Competitor URLs
competitorUrls.description: Public competitor homepages, product pages, pricing pages, or feature pages.

buyerPersona.title: Buyer persona
buyerPersona.description: Who the battlecard should help you sell to.
buyerPersona.default: founder, sales leader, or product marketer

marketContext.title: Market context
marketContext.description: Short context about your category, product, or sales motion.

reportGoal.title: Report goal
reportGoal.description: What you want the battlecard to optimize for.
reportGoal.default: Create a sales-ready competitor battlecard from public website evidence.

maxPagesPerCompany.title: Max pages per company
maxPagesPerCompany.description: Homepage plus prioritized internal pages such as Product, Features, Pricing, Customers, or About.

maxCharsPerCompany.title: Max extracted characters per company
maxCharsPerCompany.description: Caps public text sent into the model for each company.

includePricingSignals.title: Include pricing signals
includePricingSignals.description: Include public pricing and packaging observations when available.
